seo.title: Total Body Solution Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Forget the gym and get results with Total Body Solution. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Debbie has been a leading fitness expert for over 20 years. She’s been featured on numerous TV programs to talk about fitness, health and staying in shape. She thrives on helping motivate people to find discipline, and balance mind, body, and spirit to achieve their healthy living goals!

data.descriptionShort: The TOTAL BODY SOLUTION relieves pain and prevents strain in just 15 minutes.
data.descriptionLong: Burn more fat in half the time with Total Body Solution. This highly-intense cardio conditioning program will help you forget the gym. You’ll get leaner as the hottest fitness classes come to you.

modules.equipment: Yoga Mat, Sturdy Chair, Resistance Bands, Stability Ball*
modules.categories: Mobility & Flexibility, Core, Low Impact, Recovery

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.
